composition.tagline: Every piece of content, kept and searchable.
composition.cta: Find, open and download anything you've ever made.
composition.title: Your content library

beats.caption: Everything in one place
beats.narration: Every piece of content eye-vanjel makes for you is saved automatically. Let's look at your library — where you can find, open and download anything you've ever created.

beats.label: Library · Your history
beats.caption: Grouped by date
beats.narration: Here's your whole history, grouped by the day it was created. Each day shows how many generations you ran — your most recent work sits right at the top.

beats.label: Library · Search
beats.caption: Search by keyword
beats.narration: Looking for something specific? Search by keyword or theme — say, grace — and eye-vanjel filters straight to the days that mention it.

beats.label: Library · Open a day
beats.caption: Open any day
beats.narration: Open a day to see what you made — every post, study and devotional from that session, each tagged with the platforms you chose.

beats.label: Library · Read it back
beats.caption: Read any piece in full
beats.narration: Open any piece to read it in full — here's the daily devotional from that Sunday, exactly as it was written, ready to copy with a single tap.

beats.label: Library · Variations
beats.caption: Flick through variations
beats.narration: Where you asked for more than one version of a post, they're all kept — just flick between them and copy whichever fits best.

beats.label: Library · Download
beats.caption: Download in any format
beats.narration: And you can download a whole session in one go — as a Word document, a PDF, plain text or a web page. Your content, however you need it.

beats.caption: Never lose a word
beats.narration: That's your library — every word you've created, safe, searchable and ready whenever you need it.
